name_cn:

Features a drawstring closure with a signature twisted knot. Made from premium soft calfskin. Flamenco can hold a small wallet, all sizes of phones, or an A5 notebook*0.5L bottle and sunglasses*Shoulder, crossbody, or clutch*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap*Plain magnetic snap closure*Gold suede lininglo*ewe hot stamping or silver stamping🌟

Size:23*18*9cm
